CustomField.description: Calculated by comparing today's date with the end date of last event. If end date is empty on the event, will not display a number. To include the current month, the day has to pass the day of the event end date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated by comparing today's date with the end date of last event. If end date is empty on the event, will not display a number. To include the current month, the day has to pass the day of the event end date.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_1219_Cal Mon Since Last Visit
